title: Olive Oil Dispenser and Sprayer, 16oz/470ml Glass Light-Proof Pour Bottle, Kitchen Gadgets Accessories for Air Fryer, Cooking, Salad, and BBQ
features: WARM TIPS - Since we check the spraying effect at the factory, there may be a very small amount of water in the suction tube when you use it for the first time. In addition, if you encounter any problems when using the olive oil dispenser bottle, please feel free to contact us, we will provide 100% satisfactory solution for you at the first time.

2-in-1 Design – Combines an oil dispenser and oil sprayer in one. Easily spray oil to control fat intake or pour oil for precise seasoning. Perfect for grilling, baking, salad dressing, and other food preparation processes.

Food-Grade Materials – The spray bottle lid is made of BPA-free PP material, while the bottle body is crafted from lead-free, olive green glass. This light-proof design ensures the quality and freshness of your oil.
Healthy Lifestyle – Our cooking sprayer helps you control oil usage, reducing fat intake while maintaining flavor. It’s a simple yet effective way to support a healthier lifestyle.
Anti-Dripping Design – The front-protruding nozzle sprays a fine, even mist of oil without dripping, ensuring a clean and mess-free experience.
